mapper.select:
SELECT a.card_news_oid, a.card_news_nm, a.smry, a.thmb_path, COALESCE(f.img_sbst_txt_cn, a.card_news_nm) as thumbnail_alt_text, a.inq_cnt, a.open_yn, a.use_yn, a.reg_id, a.reg_dt, a.mdfcn_id, a.mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.card_news a LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f ON f.tbl_nm = 'popup_zone' AND f.tbl_oid = a.card_news_oid AND f.thmb_yn = 'Y' AND f.use_yn = 'Y' AND f.file_oid = ( SELECT MIN(f2.file_oid) FROM ${schema}.file f2 WHERE f2.tbl_nm = 'popup_zone' AND f2.tbl_oid = a.card_news_oid AND f2.thmb_yn = 'Y' AND f2.use_yn = 'Y' )
a.use_yn = 'Y' AND a.open_yn = 'Y'
AND
a.card_news_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
a.smry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
(a.card_news_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.smry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY a.card_news_oid DESC

SELECT a.card_news_oid, a.card_news_nm, a.smry, a.thmb_path, COALESCE(f.img_sbst_txt_cn, a.card_news_nm) as thumbnail_alt_text, a.inq_cnt, a.open_yn, a.use_yn, a.reg_id, a.reg_dt, a.mdfcn_id, a.mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.card_news a LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f ON f.tbl_nm = 'popup_zone' AND f.tbl_oid = a.card_news_oid AND f.thmb_yn = 'Y' AND f.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE a.card_news_oid = #{cardNewsOid}
SELECT card_news_oid, card_news_nm FROM ${schema}.card_news WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND open_yn = 'Y' AND card_news_oid < #{cardNewsOid} ORDER BY card_news_oid DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT card_news_oid, card_news_nm FROM ${schema}.card_news WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND open_yn = 'Y' AND card_news_oid > #{cardNewsOid} ORDER BY card_news_oid ASC LIMIT 1
